description:
Analyze the ionization state of a specific region in the Eagle Nebula using three narrowband FITS images located in ~/AstroImages/raw/ (502nmos.fits, 656nmos.fits, and 673nmos.fits). Apply the exact rectangular Region of Interest (ROI) coordinates specified in ~/AstroImages/nebula_project/roi_instructions.txt to each image to determine the Mean and Mode pixel intensity values. Save the results to ~/AstroImages/measurements/ionization_stats.txt using the following format:

[OIII] 502nm - Mean: <value>, Mode: <value>
H-alpha 656nm - Mean: <value>, Mode: <value>
[SII] 673nm - Mean: <value>, Mode: <value>

metadata.data_source: ESA Hubble FITS Liberator - Eagle Nebula
